portfolioCard.urlNotAviable: Site is currently not publicly available.

InfoPage.aboutText: I'm a Frontend Developer with over 7 years of experience creating modern web solutions. I work with WordPress, OpenCart, and React.js, developing both commercial websites and my own web applications. I have deep experience in layout, performance optimization, integration with third-party developers, and improving existing projects. I focus on high-quality UI/UX, stability, and scalability of solutions. I have experience working in both product teams and outsourcing with a large number of parallel projects.

description.description1: I specialize in front-end development. Being independent, I work with small to large companies, startups, design studios, and creative individuals globally.
description.description2: With 5+ years of dedicated experience, I have been involved with crafting digital experiences that captivate and engage. I focus on interaction and offer a meticulous approach to detail-oriented development. I genuinely relish bringing ideas to life, transforming them into bespoke, user-friendly, and aesthetically pleasing websites.
description.description3: But above all, my biggest passion is forming strong working relationships and genuine bonds with other like-minded, creative people.

skills.skillsText1: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, React Native, Redux, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, MySQL, PHP
skills.skillsText5: Responsive Design, Mobile First, Progressive Enhancement

experience.description1: Support and development of existing web projects. Development of new pages and functionality. Creation and configuration of custom plugins for WordPress. Optimization of site performance and stability.
experience.description2: Support and development of 30+ WordPress sites. Development and launch of new sites (ACF, Elementor, Avada). Data and content migration between sites. Working with large amounts of data. Hosting setup and support.
experience.description3: Support for a large online store. Development of templates, modules and customization of OpenCart. Working with the database and optimizing queries. Integrating the site's databases with the warehouse system. Development of an internal panel for employees. Development of a service center panel.
experience.description4: Site migration from static layout to React.js. UI/UX redesign and improvement. Performance optimization (~40% speed improvement). Implementation of two versions of the site. Image optimization and localization. Development of custom solutions for working with data. SEO optimization.
experience.description5: Development of 10+ WordPress websites. Creating custom solutions for business tasks. Redesign, support and optimization of existing websites. Fixing bugs and improving performance. Mastering and implementing React.js in projects.
experience.description6: Optimization of team processes and efficiency improvement. Implementation of task management system (Jira). Implementation of time tracking. Launch of mobile application and 4 web projects from scratch to turnkey.
experience.description7: Website development from scratch. Layout (Pixel Perfect). Working with CMS (WordPress). Supporting existing projects. Participating in website redesign.
